entities.name: FARMER-PARTICIPATORY RESEARCH
entities.description: A research approach involving farmers in the development and testing of agricultural technologies

entities.name: TECHNOLOGY DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The process of creating new agricultural tools or methods

entities.name: ADOPTION RATES
entities.description: The speed and extent to which new technologies are accepted by farmers

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL RESEARCH
entities.description: Systematic investigation to improve farming practices and productivity

entities.name: MALAWI
entities.description: A country in Southeast Africa where the study was conducted

entities.name: ZIMBABWE
entities.description: A country in Southern Africa where the study was conducted

entities.name: WOMEN FARMERS
entities.description: Female agricultural practitioners who are often under-represented in research

entities.name: DIAGNOSTIC ACTIVITIES
entities.description: Initial steps in FPR to identify problems and opportunities

entities.name: PLANNING OF EXPERIMENTS
entities.description: The process of designing agricultural trials

entities.name: ASSESSMENT OF RESULTS
entities.description: The evaluation of outcomes from on-farm experiments

entities.name: FARMERS' CAPACITY
entities.description: The ability of farmers to conduct their own experiments and research

entities.name: TRADITIONAL RESEARCH-LED
entities.description: A research approach where the researcher controls the process

entities.name: RESEARCHER-LED WITH FARMER INPUT
entities.description: A hybrid approach where researchers lead but incorporate farmer feedback

entities.name: FARMER-LED WITH RESEARCH INPUT
entities.description: A hybrid approach where farmers lead and researchers provide support

entities.name: GENDER ISSUES
entities.description: Social and structural factors affecting the participation and benefits for different genders

entities.name: PRA TECHNIQUES
entities.description: Participatory Rural Appraisal techniques used for planning and data collection

entities.name: ON-FARM EXPERIMENTS
entities.description: Agricultural trials conducted on actual farms rather than research stations
